description_long: This is a round-bodied ceramic vase with a narrow, slightly flared neck and two small loop handles on opposite sides of its midsection. The surface of the vase is adorned with incised geometric patterns, including bands of lines, diamonds, and stylized motifs, primarily concentrated on the front half. The neck and handles are slightly darker in color, suggesting either intentional coloring or natural patina from age. The body of the vase has a matte, slightly rough finish, with visible signs of wear and subtle discoloration, indicating age or exposure. The handles are robust and functional, allowing for easy lifting or carrying. The overall form is symmetrical and balanced, making it suitable as a decorative piece in both indoor and outdoor urban settings.
description: A round, ceramic vase with a narrow neck, two loop handles, and incised geometric patterns on its surface. The finish is matte and slightly worn, with earthy tones and visible decorative motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full round body, both loop handles, and the most detailed geometric patterns on the surface.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting one handle and the transition from the patterned front to the plainer back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back of the vase and both handles.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other handle and a partial view of the geometric patterns.
